becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor
becomeTutor.desc: Teach your own students on Talim — create materials and assessments and track their progress. An admin reviews each request.
becomeTutor.pending: Your tutor request is pending review. We'll enable your tutor tools once it's approved.
becomeTutor.rejected: Your previous request was declined. You can submit a new one.

common.noMaterials: No materials yet. Add your first one using the cards above.

auth.serverError: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
auth.accountDeactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact your tutor.
auth.name: Name
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed. Email may already be in use.
auth.classCodeHint: Have a class code from your tutor? Enter it to join their class.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.desc: Manage your profile, password, and plan.
settings.languageHint: Change your language using the selector in the header.

content.rereadHint: Re-extract this document's text with OCR — useful for scanned PDFs.
content.rereadError: Couldn't re-read the document. Please try again.
content.processingDesc: Status: {status}. The page will refresh when ready.
content.failedDesc: Could not extract text from the PDF. It may be scanned or image-only — try OCR reprocessing.
content.selectSection: Select a section from the sidebar.
content.noPodcastDesc: Create an AI voice podcast from your content sections.
content.podcastLearnerEmpty: Your tutor hasn't shared a podcast for this material yet.
content.audioNotReady: Audio is not ready for this episode yet.
content.podcastNeedsReady: Content must be ready before creating a podcast.
content.noHistoryYet: No quizzes or summaries yet. Take a quiz or generate a summary.
content.pdfNoTextInSelection: No text found in this area. Try a different region or ask without selecting.
content.selectAreaToAsk: Select a part of the material to ask a question.
content.selectTranscriptToAsk: Select transcript text to ask about that part.
content.transcriptClickToSeek: Click a sentence to jump to that part of the video.
content.videoEmbedUnavailable: This video cannot be embedded. Open it on YouTube instead.
content.viewerNotAvailable: No viewer available for this type.
content.linkFailed: Could not add link. Check the URL and try again.
content.deleteMaterialDescription: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. Its chapters, chat, quizzes and podcast data will also be lost. This action cannot be undone.
content.deleteMaterialDescriptionGeneric: The material will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

chat.title: AI Tutor
chat.subtitle: Online — answers from your material
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your AI tutor for {title}. Your material is shown on the left. Select a PDF area or transcript text and ask your question — I'll answer about that exact part.
chat.areaImagePrompt: Explain what you see in this selected part of the document.
chat.footer: AI answers are generated from your material and may include sources.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Talim AI
onboarding.desc: Your tutor created this account for you. For security, change your temporary password in Settings.

slides.subtitle: AI-generated slides from this material
slides.generatingHint: Our AI is turning this material into a presentation. This takes a moment.
slides.emptyBody: Generate a clean, visual slide deck from this content — perfect for studying or teaching.
slides.notAvailableLearner: Your tutor hasn't created slides for this material yet.
slides.error: Couldn't generate slides. Please try again.
slides.limitReached: You've reached your AI generation limit ({used}/{limit} this month). Contact your admin to raise it.
slides.limitReachedGeneric: AI generation isn't available on your current plan. Please contact your admin.

hero.subtitle: Upload any material — PDF, video, slides or a lecture — and get AI-generated summaries, podcasts, quizzes and a personal tutor.
hero.trust: Works with PDFs, YouTube, slides and lectures

features.title: Everything you need to master any topic
features.subtitle: From upload to mastery — one platform that adapts to the way you learn best.
features.summaryDesc: Pull the key points out of any material. No need to re-read a whole chapter — grasp the core ideas in minutes.
features.podcastDesc: Turn your content into AI-generated podcasts. Learn while commuting, working out or doing chores.
features.quizDesc: Generate custom exams and quizzes with detailed answer explanations. Track your progress over time.
features.tutorDesc: Select any part of your material and ask precise questions. Answers come with direct references to your content.

how.title: How Talim AI works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps from raw material to deep understanding.
how.step1Text: Drop in PDFs, paste YouTube links, upload slides or share lectures. We handle the rest.
how.step2Text: AI breaks your material into sections, writes summaries, produces podcasts and builds quizzes.
how.step3Text: Read the summaries, listen to podcasts, take quizzes or chat with your AI tutor.

tutors.title: Teaching your own students?
tutors.subtitle: Talim is not just for solo learning. Tutors can manage their own students, create materials and game-style quizzes, and track progress in one place.
tutors.point1Text: Upload your own textbooks and notes, then assign them to the right students.
tutors.point2Text: Build quizzes for every topic and test your students in an engaging way.
tutors.point3Text: See each student's coverage, quiz scores and activity in a single dashboard.

preview.title: See it in action
preview.subtitle: A clean interface built for deep learning — no clutter.
preview.paragraph1Lead: The genetic code is the set of rules living cells use to translate information encoded in genetic material into proteins. It is a
preview.paragraph1Tail: , where each sequence of three nucleotides is called a codon.

cta.title: Ready to learn smarter?
cta.subtitle: Upload your material and get AI-powered summaries, podcasts, quizzes and a personal tutor.
